RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court ruled as follows -- (1) DEFENDANT ARCE TICKEY PLASTERING CO.'s motion for summary judgment, or in the alternative, summary adjudication (previously heard on 12/16/05) -- Motion for summary adjudication granted as to strict liability, false representation, intentional tort and punitive damages; denied as to negligence. Motion for summary judgment denied. Court sustained objections as to Cano deposition and Ken Cohen deposition; overruled objections as to the Riverside material. Plaintiff is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (2) DEFENDANT ARCE TICKEY PLASTERING CO.'s Amended Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint -- The Court granted defendant's motion for leave to file cross-complaint and ordered it be severed. Defendant Acre is to prepare an order. (301/AJR/DS) JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II, REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR# 8620
